violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Both names associated with Serv safe for the business are no longer employed.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Black electrical tape on the ice dispenser is not a cleanable surface.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Box of single-use lids was being stored on the ground.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors behind the syrup station have excess debris and spillage and need to be cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop being stored in the mop sink was not put in a position to dry properly.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. Sanitizer sink read at 500ppm, according to product label should range between 200-400ppm.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine needs to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towels were out at the time of inspection.
